title: Requirements needed to construct a unique BT

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Requirements needed to construct a unique BT". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
content.inputFormat: The input will be a list of integers representing the inorder traversal of a binary tree.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean indicating whether a unique binary tree can be constructed from the given inorder traversal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the given inorder traversal can construct a unique binary tree by verifying if there are any duplicate values and if the tree can be uniquely reconstructed.
